metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_204
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Analyses of highly purified synaptic vesicles by mass spectrometry and immunobloting with Rab7-specific antbodies indicate the presence of Rab7 on these vesicles. Nevertheless, microscopic analyses of Rab7 and synaptophysin co-staining in hippocampal neurons indicate only partial colocalisation of Rab7-positive puncta with synaptic vesicles in these cells.. Experimental description: Legend to Figure 2 "Enrichment profiles of Rab GTPases on purified SVs isolated from rat brain homogenates, determined by quantitative
immunoblotting"

27/3/2017 Pim:
- Personal communication with the authors (John Chua of, at that time, the Jahn Lab) informed us that the species of the pEGFP-Rab7 construct was Canis Lupus (wolf).
- Based on the data presented in Fig.1 on SV localizaton annotation is made against the rat species.

checks.error_message: No inferences attributed to this model graph in the materializer output. Likely a parse failure or other materializer skip — re-run on this model alone to investigate.
